title: Lookin' Pretty Modpack
description: A modpack focused on aesthetic variety, and making Minecraft look, well-- pretty!
body:
# If you’re a Minecraft builder who loves aesthetics, this modpack is just for you! #
___
**Lookin' Pretty** is all about adding more variety to Minecraft, so you can create unique and stunning builds. It's made for a Vanilla+ experience, so while there's plenty to do in creative mode, Survival builders are more than welcome!

**Some key mods included**:
- Farmers Delight
- Oh the Biomes We've Gone
- Biomes o' plenty
- Stuctory
- and many more!!

---
And, it comes with some fantastic resource pack options to help bring your visions to life! 

There’s also a sprinkle of goofy fun included to keep things light and entertaining as you dive into your creative projects.

## Happy Building!
